creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello nork,

> The library using _ZTI9HashTable is -lBasicUsageEnvironment, but
> in this case, -lUsageEnvironment -> -lBasicUsageEnvironment. So,
> to fix, I suggest following patch:
> 
> multimedia/vlc/files/patch-configure
> - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
> --- configure.orig 2009-07-28 07:25:54.000000000 +0900
> +++ configure 2009-11-02 02:56:25.303170104 +0900
> @@ -37516,8 +37516,8 @@
> 
> done
> 
> - other_libs="-lgroupsock -lBasicUsageEnvironment -lUsageEnvironment"
> - other_libs_pic="-lgroupsock_pic -lBasicUsageEnvironment_pic -lUsageEnvironment_pic"
> + other_libs="-lgroupsock -lUsageEnvironment -lBasicUsageEnvironment"
> + other_libs_pic="-lgroupsock_pic -lUsageEnvironment_pic -lBasicUsageEnvironment_pic"
> if test "${SYS}" = "mingw32"; then
> # add ws2_32 for closesocket, select, recv
> other_libs="$other_libs -lws2_32"
> - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
> 
> I don't test it, so if you confirm, please report to upstream by
> fixing configure.ac.

I've just tested it, and unfortunately it does not fix the problem.

Your patch has been applied succesfully, and now
/usr/local/lib/vlc/demux/liblive555_plugin.la contains the following
line:

# Libraries that this one depends upon.
dependency_libs=' -L/usr/ports/multimedia/vlc/work/fake//usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/live/UsageEnvironment -lUsageEnvironment -L/usr/local/live/groupsock -lgroupsock -L/usr/local/live/BasicUsageEnvironment -lBasicUsageEnvironment -L/usr/local/live/liveMedia -lliveMedia /usr/local/lib/libvlccore.la /usr/local/lib/libhal.la /usr/local/lib/libdbus-1.la -pthread -lrt /usr/local/lib/libintl.la /usr/local/lib/libiconv.la

where -lUsageEnvironment is before -lBasicUsageEnvironment, but now
lgroupsock is in between, and the same error about _ZTI9HashTable still
occurs... I'll try to investigate a bit more.

Regards,
-- 
Th. Thomas.
